subject: RESPONSE
body:
so now I understand why you didn't  respond to my e-mail  . From what I heard 
lastnight , you have been otherwise far more  importantly involved  with  
plans and objectives for  your  immediate future.  You know how much I wish it 
was different and if  there is anything I can do .
 Don't count me out.   I did not  know it  was this fast  and looming  until 
lastnight.   Sorry. 
Wish I could see you , too,  but will send BML , etc. , with  your 1 st night 
Canukah gift for now.
A HUG,
Marcia M.
